heading: Today
text: Variable clouds in the morning, becoming mostly cloudy, with a good chance of showers from Rt. 2 south. Potential for a few stray showers north. Highs in the 50s to low 60s. Wind turning south to southeast near 10 mph, increasing to 15 mph from the Green Mountains west, gusting to 20 mph in the afternoon.

heading: Tonight
text: Evening showers south tapering off. Mostly cloudy, with additional, scattered showers arriving from the west after midnight. Lows in the 40s, a few upper 30s in the cold spots. South wind near 10 mph, gusting to near 20 along Lake Champlain.

heading: Sunday
text: Mostly cloudy in the morning with localized passing showers, then mixing with sunshine as showers taper off west to east in the afternoon. Highs in the 60s, some upper 50s north. Southwest wind near 10 mph.

heading: Mother’s Day
text: Mostly cloudy in the morning with localized passing showers, then mixing with sunshine as showers taper off west to east in the afternoon. Highs in the 60s, some upper 50s north. Southwest wind near 10 mph.
